title: Pixel MINIMAP
body:
**Adds a new pixelated minimap to the game!** # Controls If you go to Controls in your minecraft settings, you will find " Pixel Minimap " **_1) Open Full Map,_** ( ```Default keybind J```)
**_2) Show Waypoints_** ( ```Default keybind Q```)
**_2) Toggle Minimap_** ( ```Default keybind M```)
# Functions ### Open full Map The first control - Open full map, or , better refered as, MAP controls, opens a big map control screen covering the entire screen, wich shows the chunks you discovered recently ( The older ones are still there but not visible, as to prevent lag ).
Besides the map, there are 2 main buttons and 2 information buttons:

```MAIN BUTTONS``` 1) **Waypoints** - Shows you all the waypoints you created/allows you to create waypoints
2) **Settings** - Allos you to change your minimaps settings.
- The first 3 settings are about if you want passive mobs to be shown on your minimap, hostile mobs and lastly players.
- The 4th setting is if you want to see caves on your minimap when you reach y 50 and below, and the 5th most important setting
- and the 5th most important setting Vertical Slice - -- wich will always be on by default but some prepare it to be off or only to caves. This option makes the minimap update every y level, so if you are at y level 50, you will see every block that is in your minimap radius at y level 50, but if you go to y level 51 you will see every block in your minimap radius at y level 51... , And this setting has 4 options :
All, wich does the y level rerendering for every y level
Caves , wich only does the y level rerendering for only y level 51 and below ( cave layers )
Surface , wich only does the y level rerendering for only y level 51 + ( surface layers)
OFF , wich disables the Vertical slicing option. - We also have Coordoantes Offset, Minimap Offset and Minimap size, wich can move the minimap and coordonates to different places if you dont like where they are and , the minimap size - change the minimap size.

```INFORMATION BUTTONS``` 1) **Creator** Wich shows who the creator of the mod is 2) **Special Thanks** Wich thanks the person who helped the creator make this mod and also promotes his new ai site. ### Show Waypoints The second control - Show waypoints, will show all your waypoints with arrows telling you where to head to get to them ( note, to get to a waypoints, go in the direction where the waypoint marker is right in front of you, not left nor right. ) ### Toggle Minimap Open/Close the minimap # Miscellaneous 1) You can Edit/Delete/Chat/Tp to/a waypoint. But Tping only works if you got Operator, otherwise, it will tell you in chat : Nuh Uh! You can only tp to a waypoint with operator! 2) This mod was originaly intended to be created as a normal minimap, but the idea of a pixelated minimap sounded cooler! 3) Originaly , vertical slicing was intended to not be by default turned on, but was changed to All because is a unique ghimmick! # IMPORTANT **You need to have instaled Kotlin for Java in order for this mod to work** # VIDEO https://www.youtube.com/shorts/D8aFVdXCN-0
